# yellow

Wraps its argument in the ANSI escape codes for yellow text.

```rad
yellow(_item: any) -> str
```

```rad
yellow("Hello")        // -> "Hello" wrapped in the yellow escape
yellow(42)             // -> "42" wrapped in the yellow escape
```

## See also

`red`, `green`, `color_rgb`
